tests.description: Whitespace-only query must be rejected with 4xx
tests.name: empty_query
tests.note: Pydantic min_length=1 or normalise validator expected to reject

tests.description: Query >2000 chars must be rejected with 4xx
tests.name: oversized_query

tests.description: Out-of-domain query must return 200 with valid replay-safe vijay_validation
tests.name: out_of_domain_query

tests.description: Same trace_id must yield identical vijay_validation.runtime_hash
tests.name: replay_determinism

tests.description: 5 concurrent requests must all return 200 with replay_safe=true
tests.name: concurrent_execution

tests.description: GET /health must return 200 ok with sub-100ms latency
tests.name: health_under_load
